# Evaluation Snapshot

## Prompt
Compare decision documentation with source-of-truth clarification and choose the clearer fit for a meaningful architectural choice.

## Expected selection
use

## Why
The task is to record why a path was chosen, including tradeoffs and consequences.

## Expected object
A concise decision note or ADR draft that explains the rationale rather than only the outcome.

## Boundary notes
This is an adr-write case, not a source-of-truth-check case.

## Verification hooks
- state the rationale
- note the tradeoffs
- avoid recasting the note as document ownership work
